---
title: "The Hon. Caroline Mary Frances Jervis"
---

## The Hon. Caroline Mary Frances Jervis

**Dates:** (1823/4 -1917)

### Description

ward of Caroline Vernon Harcourt

### Biography

Sister of the 3rd Viscount St. Vincent, her mother died in 1828, and she was orphaned 1839;  she was a ward of Caroline Vernon Harcourt;  she was given the precedence of a Viscount's daughter in 1860 [PB, will of Caroline Vernon Harcourt, 1881 census]

### Letters

- Letter from August 6, 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
